topic: GEO and AI SEO: Optimising for Generative Search
target_audience: enterprise marketing directors and SEO managers responsible for organic search at companies with 50+ employees
key_points: Generative AI tools now influence 15-30% of navigational and informational queries
Entity-based optimisation is the foundation of GEO strategy
Brands cited in AI answers see 2-3× higher click-through rates on branded queries
Knowledge Graph entries are the highest-leverage GEO asset
Traditional keyword rankings remain important but GEO requires a parallel strategy
trust_factors: Clients cited in ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude responses

testimonials.quote: Our brand now appears in AI-generated answers for our top 20 target queries. It's a new channel we didn't have before.
testimonials.author: Lena C., VP Marketing — Enterprise SaaS

cta: Audit Your AI Search Visibility — Free Assessment
